name: aoi_devanahalli_airport_corridor
comment: Greenfield AOI for built-up change detection. North Bengaluru airport / Devanahalli corridor, where farmland in 2017 became townships, aerospace/industrial parks and the NH-44 airport interchange by 2024 -- so dNDBI (built-up index) swings hard and the densification is unambiguous, unlike the already-saturated ORR box. Same box reused for 2017/2019/2024. CRS WGS84 (EPSG:4326); pipeline reprojects to EPSG:32643 (UTM 43N) before clipping.

properties.corridor: North Bengaluru NH-44 airport / Devanahalli greenfield frontier
